history.content: Hey prom what MCP connections do we have setup currently

Current setup I can confirm from this session:

- **Connected and available now:** `Supabase MCP`, `Vercel MCP`  
- I checked workspace + `.prometheus` tree and didn’t find a central MCP server config file exposed here, so I can’t enumerate any additional dormant/disconnected MCP entries beyond those two active integrations.
Sorry Im gonna fix that right now, the mcp manage tool didnt work

Yep—you’re right, and thanks for flagging it.

I just tested it and got: **“Unknown tool: mcp_server_manage.”**  
So in this session, the MCP management endpoint itself isn’t registered/available yet.

Once you re-enable/fix it, tell me “try again” and I’ll immediately list all configured MCP servers and connection status.
